author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

 CALLING ALL GUILDS AND GUILD LEADERS  

With suspicion and distrust rising in the galaxy, The Council of Peace (COP) has organized the first ever Council of Peace Assembly (COPA), a one day, virtual festival in which Star Atlas guilds come together for discussion and friendly competition.

COPA is a pitch contest for all guilds of Star Atlas on why someone should join your guild over all others.

There will be prizes for guilds and audience members including an exclusive Star Atlas PC from iBUYPOWER!

If you're interested in presenting, please submit your presentation here: https://staratlas.com/partnerships/copa22

Submissions close June 6th

Learn more: ⁠unknown
